curation_notes: Primary location derived from the patch diff which modifies getExtensionIdForOpcode in src/serialization/sb3.js. The fix adds regex-based sanitization (replacing characters not matching [\w-] with hyphens) to the extension ID prefix extracted from opcode strings. No sibling files share this vulnerability pattern — sb2.js does not contain the same function or extension ID resolution logic. Pre-assigned class insecure-deserialization (CWE-502) is correct: untrusted SB3 project files are deserialized and the unsanitized extension IDs allow loading arbitrary URLs as executable worker scripts.
